mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment directly reduces aggregate disposable income and consumer spending, compressing corporate revenue and earnings, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Labor market deterioration during COVID-19 pandemic onset
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC of UNRATE monthly change vs. 20-day forward returns remains below 0.03 or the correlation is positive in > 60% of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls to the zero lower bound, it signals an aggressively accommodative monetary stance that reduces discount rates and encourages risk-taking, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Federal Reserve emergency rate cut to near zero on March 15, 2020
failure_condition: In episodes where FEDFUNDS <= 0.25%, 20-day forward S&P 500 returns are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.1) or the mean return is less than the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous sharp contraction in payroll employment and spike in the unemployment rate indicates a severe and accelerating recession, eroding corporate profits and investor confidence, driving negative S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:April 2020 payrolls fell by 20.5 million and UNRATE peaked at 14.7%
failure_condition: When the joint trigger activates, the subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns are not negative in at least 70% of historical occurrences, or the average return is not significantly different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: During the initial months of an economic contraction, consecutive declines in industrial production reflect collapsing manufacturing output and demand destruction, which leads to lower corporate earnings and negative S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines month-over-month for 2 consecutive months
evidence_refs: fact:Industrial production fell sharply in March and April 2020
failure_condition: If the signal triggers, the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 50% of cases, or the mean return is not statistically different from the unconditional mean at the 5% level.

mechanism_narrative: Falling consumer prices signal weakening aggregate demand and deflationary pressures, which compress profit margins and delay spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: The Rank IC of CPIAUCSL month-over-month change vs. 20-day forward returns is above -0.03 or the correlation is positive in more than 40% of rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in housing starts signals a collapse in residential investment and consumer durables demand, which acts as a leading indicator of recession and depresses equity prices over a short-term horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Housing starts fell 22.3% month-over-month in April 2020
failure_condition: When the trigger activates, the 5-day forward S&P 500 return is negative in fewer than 60% of cases or the average return is zero or positive.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a near-zero federal funds rate and a rapidly rising unemployment rate indicates that the economy is in a liquidity trap where monetary policy is insufficient to counter the downturn, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:March 2020 saw both zero rates and surging unemployment
regime_hint: zero lower bound with rising unemployment
failure_condition: When the joint trigger is active, the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 50% of cases, or the mean return is not significantly negative at the 10% level.

mechanism_narrative: During the early contraction phase of a recession, simultaneous month-over-month declines in both industrial production and real retail sales signal a synchronized collapse in supply and demand, which amplifies earnings deterioration and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and RSAFS both decline month-over-month for 2 consecutive months
evidence_refs: fact:Both series fell sharply in March–April 2020
failure_condition: If the joint trigger generates a signal, the 60-day forward return is negative in fewer than 70% of instances or the average return is not significantly different from the unconditional mean over the same horizon.
